jsonLd.title: Rivigo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
